zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Heard於1649年1月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾時，她的父親Captain John Heard36歲，母親Elizabeth Hull21歲。她於1668年5月6日與John Ham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1706年9月12日在她的家鄉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Heard于1649年1月26日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾时，她的父亲Captain John Heard36岁，母亲Elizabeth Hull21岁。她于1668年5月6日与John Ham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1706年9月12日在她的家乡享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Heard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English herd(e), hird(e), hord(e), Older Scots herd, hird ‘herdsman’, i.e. one who looked after cattle, sheep, or goats (Old English heorde, hierde). Compare Hardman .

variants.name: Hirt
meanings: German: occupational name for a herdsman, Middle High German hirt, cognate with English Heard .

variants.name: Hardman
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English herdeman, herdema+n, hurdeman (Old English hierdeman, heordman) ‘herdsman, one who tends livestock’. Compare Heard .
English: occasionally from the Middle English personal name Hardman (Old English Heardmann, literally ‘hard man’).
English and Irish: shortened form of   Hardeman  .

variants.name: Heird
meanings: Scottish: probably a variant of   Heard  .

variants.name: Hard
meanings: English: variant of   Heard  . Compare   Hardman  .

English, German, Dutch, and Swedish (Hård): nickname for a stern or severe man, from Middle English, Middle Low German hard, Middle Dutch hart, hert, Swedish hård ‘hard, inflexible’. The Swedish name was probably originally a soldier's name.

English: topographic name denoting a dweller on hard, firm ground, from a transferred use of the adjective in 2 above, or perhaps sometimes from a landing-place, as in the modern Hampshire use of the term hard. Compare Hardacre .

variants.name: Herd
meanings: Scottish (Fife) and English: variant of   Heard  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Heard was born on 26 January 1649, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America, her father, Captain John Heard, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth Hull, was 21. She married John Ham on 6 May 1668, in New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 12 September 1706, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Heard est née le 26 janvier 1649, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Captain John Heard, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hull, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Ham le 6 mai 1668, à New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 septembre 1706, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Heard am 26. Januar 1649 in New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Captain John Heard 36 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hull 21. Sie hat am 6. Mai 1668 in New Hampshire, British Colonial America John Ham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. September 1706 im Alter von 57 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Heard è nata il il 26 gennaio 1649 nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America, sua padre, Captain John Heard, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Hull, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Ham il 6 maggio 1668, nel New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 12 settembre 1706, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Heardが1649年1月26日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父Captain John Heardは36歳，母Elizabeth Hullは21歳であった。1668年5月6日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアでJohn Hamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1706年9月12日に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Heard(이)가 1649년 1월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Captain John Heard(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hull(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1668년 5월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르에서 John Ham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1706년 9월 12일 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Heard nasceu em 26 de janeiro de 1649, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, Captain John Heard, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hull, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com John Ham em 6 de maio de 1668, em New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de setembro de 1706, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Heard родилась 26 января 1649 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Captain John Heard было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hull, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Ham 6 мая 1668 г. в местности ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 12 сентября 1706 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Heard nació el 26 de enero de 1649, en New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Captain John Heard, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hull, tenía 21 años. Se casó con John Ham el 6 de mayo de 1668, en New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 12 de septiembre de 1706, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
